system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Athletics
Type: 1 Skill Action
Qi: 2

You croak, gathering Qi in your arms, before shooting forward at your opponent and ramming into them with your head. Make an Athletics Skill roll against the Parry of your target. On a Success you deliver 1d10 Damage per Rank of Neigong. The range of this maneuver is 5 feet times your Qi level. You move your opponent back 5 feet once you hit them. Cathartic: You fall on all fours and croak, gathering Qi throughout your body before again shooting forward at your opponent, moving 10 feet times Qi level and pushing them back that full distance, delivering 2d10 Damage per Rank of Neigong and 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Qi. When used Cathartically, you gain 2 Extra Imbalance Points.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: You fall on all fours and croak, gathering Qi throughout your body before again shooting forward at your opponent, moving 10 feet times Qi level and pushing them back that full distance, delivering 2d10 Damage per Rank of Neigong and 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Qi. When used Cathartically, you gain 2 Extra Imbalance Points.
